ARKSSHOP.Title: ARKS Shop
ARKSSHOP.Subtitle: Buy gear from selected compendiums
ARKSSHOP.Description: Browse the selected equipment compendiums, choose a player-owned character, and purchase items directly into that actor's inventory.
ARKSSHOP.EmptyCharacters: No owned character is available for purchases.
ARKSSHOP.EmptyInventory: No sellable shop items were found in the selected compendiums.

SplitCosts.Title: Split Costs
SplitCosts.NoCharacters: No owned characters are available for this split.

Errors.InvalidTotal: Enter a total cost greater than 0.
Errors.NoPool: Select at least one character to split this cost.
Errors.TotalMismatch: Assigned contributions must exactly match the total cost.
Errors.InvalidActor: One of the selected characters is not available.
Errors.LockedTooHigh: Existing non-zero contributions already exceed the total cost.
Errors.NotEnoughGold: {actor} does not have enough money to pay {cost} gp.
Errors.NoAdjustableActors: All selected characters already have non-zero contributions. Clear one value to split the remainder.
Errors.NoPayments: At least one selected character must pay part of the cost.

Messages.ChatIntro: Split cost applied for a total of {total} gp:

OpenShop.Name: Open shop window
OpenShop.Hint: Open the ARKS Shop boilerplate window.

ShowButton.Name: Show Item Directory button
ShowButton.Hint: Adds an Open Shop button to the footer of the Item Directory.

Compendiums.Name: Selected equipment compendiums
Compendiums.Hint: Stores the compendium collections the shop can read from.
Compendiums.MenuHint: Choose which equipment compendiums ARKS Shop should use.
Compendiums.FormIntro: Select the item compendiums that should populate the shop. Eligible packs are selected by default on first load.
Compendiums.NoneFound: No equipment-like item compendiums were found.

Errors.NoCharacter: Select a character you own before buying items.
Errors.InvalidItem: That shop item could not be loaded.
Errors.InvalidQuantity: Enter a quantity of at least 1.
Errors.NotEnoughGold: The selected character does not have enough money.
Errors.CannotMakeChange: The selected character cannot make exact change with the carried coin denominations.
Errors.PurchaseFailed: The purchase could not be completed.
